case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1345 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.835/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.8356/2025 (Antedate) 3. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 4. For hearing of main case 17.12.2025 Syed Asif Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< 1&2. Matter is already fixed on 29.01.2026. Counsel submits that under the instructions of the Petitioner, he does not want to press instant Constitutional Petition, therefore, seeking antedating of the matter. Accordingly, the listed applications are allowed and matter is taken up for hearing today. In view of the statement made by learned counsel for the petitioner, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
